Title: Hunt & Gather
SubTitle: Hunt and Gather quests are a popular way to level your toon. Currently these quests are disabled on the Sandstorm server.
Crazy Larry:
## Quest Guide: Crazy Larry / Toomba H&G Quest

**Level:** All  
**Class:** All  
**NPCs:** Crazy Larry, Toomba  
**Location:** Kelinar, SOM  

Something in the air is causing chaos. Look out for interesting folks needing your help.

Depending on your level, the items you're asked to get will vary. Always hunt mobs of your own level to obtain the items he asks for. "Make sure to go after the ones you can defeat. No use going into battle knowing you're going to lose." This quest is **repeatable**.

### Level 60

**Crazy Larry:** Roaming the road NE of Kelinar Village in Kelinar (S). Paranoid, asking for supplies to weather the coming war:
- **Bar of Reinforced Tin** – gobs in Vox, perma
- **Scaled Snake Booties** – young anacondas in Kerra Isle / East Toxx, or Cryptkeepers in Dead Hills
- **Piercing Fish Whistle** – large/ancient dragon eels in ZK or Dead Hills (W)
- **Frog Hair Mats** – Froglok Channelers/Foragers outside/inside Guk, or LB mobs near the King in Guk Dungeon

**Toomba:** Near the Evil Waysender, by a rock in SOM. Wants to bash things more than usual. Obtain:
- **Shiny Boar Hoof** – Murkwood Boars nearby
- **Poisoned Spider Fang** – Murkwood Spiders nearby
- **Swampvine Berries** – Brutes nearby
- **Flaxbread** – buy from merchant (250 tunar)

### Level 45+

**Crazy Larry asks for:**
- Frog Hair Tufts – lower level frogs in Guk
- Sturdy Bar of Tin ??
- Shrill Fish Whistle – sharks off coast in Mariel
- Padded Snake Booties – anacondas/pythos in Brokenskull Rock or Stonewatchers

### Level 20 and under

**Crazy Larry asks for:**
- Snake Booties – tree vipers near any city
- Bar of Tin – low level gobs
- Fish Whistle – drops off Pikes N of FP (TY Steven)
- Frog Hair – from Froglok villagers in Grobb

### Reward

You are rewarded with a **level/class specific item**, **XP**, and a **stack of new XP gems** (stack to ten, lasts for one hour). Each XP gem adds about **30k XP** to each mob you kill.
Crethley Manor:
## Quest Guide: Crethley Manor Hunt and Gather

**Level:** 20-27  
**Class:** All  
**NPC:** Elzilor Marbe  
**Location:** Crethley Manor  

Log this Hunt and Gather quest with **Elzilor Marbe**, located south of the lake in a farmyard. She asks you to return to her with **Runes of Crethley Manor**.

The **Crethley Manor house** is located in the northern part of the Crethley Manor zone (one zone south and east of Wyndhaven), north of the lake.

**Targets:** Zombies, Skeletons, and The Maid drop the Rune of Crethley Manor. Farm a full stack and turn it in to Elzilor.

**Reward:** 250k XP without luck.

Lilara & Skerg:
## One-Off Hunt & Gather Quests

**Lilara (Cara Village, C)** – Low level toons only

- Lilara roams near the village. She lost her kitty 🐱.
- Kitty popup usually appears over the hill, east of Lilara (or near Centre/West).
- The 'kitty' is actually a bear 🐻. When it spawns, it’s attacked by two wolves 🐺.
- Save Kitty quickly! Once saved, interact with her (press square) and she runs home.
- Return to Lilara for reward: **100k XP** (w/o luck) & **200 tunar**. Quest is repeatable.

**Skerg (road north from FP)** – High level toons only

- Skerg wants a pretty necklace 💎 and sends you to Dead Hills.
- Kill zombies & spiders to collect **2 zombie sinews** and **2 rusty needles**.
- Reward: a low-value stackable necklace.
Pickclaw Hunt & Gather:
## Pickclaw Hunt & Gather Quest

**Level:** ALL  
**Class:** ALL  
**Quest NPC:** Udrick Lazow  
**Location:** Highpass

> Note: it is possible to level your new toon very fast, solo'ing the pickclaw camps and using luck or XP pots.

### Mobs Locations
- East door of Highpass and down the road  
- West of the gate at the wall between Rivervale and Misty Thicket  

> Rivervale: No NPC to turn in items, must coach to HP to speak with Udrick.

### NPCs
- **Udrick Lazow (Highpass)**: Accepts weapons and sashes from appropriate level mobs for XP & tunar.  
- **Yalie Keylotta (Highpass)**: Mentions a 'key' to defeat goblins.

### Camps
- Highpass: East door before hill & camps up the road past first gate house on hills left/right  
- Rivervale (Misty Thicket, E): North to end of wall, around wall, west past goblin tower. Three camps + occasional roamers.

### Mob Levels & Farming
- 6 groups: 8ish, 18ish, 28ish, 38ish, 48ish, 58ish  
- Farm camps to level 30, then delete quest & speak to NPC for harder quest.  
- HP mobs roam up the road; Misty Thicket mobs roam towards the wall.  
- Kill mobs that con LB → Yellow; Greens & Reds cannot be turned in.  
- Loot **sashes**, **totems**, **weapons**. Totems & weapons give most XP, rarer drops.

### Drops
- Each mob type drops melee or caster weapon (rarer) + same sash (stack to 99)  
- **Shoddy Pickclaw Key**: Much rarer, stack to 10, used for pickclaw key quest.  
  - Highpass: Not a literal key, just an interesting find.  
  - Rivervale: "A key without a lock, store it in your sock, when the clock goes tic tock you can knock."

### Safe Camps
- Small camps with only level 8/9 mobs (non-interactable treasure chest + fire)

### Group Level Caps
- **Group 1:** Brawlers / Shamans (8/9) → Completable 1-25(-?) / Not Completable (?-)29-60  
- **Group 2:** Adept Brawlers / Adept Shamans (18/19) → Completable (?-)20-29(-?) / Not Completable (?-)37-60  
- **Group 3:** Warriors / Mystics (28/29) → Completable (?-)29-39(-?) / Not Completable 1-20(-?) & (?-)45-60  
- **Group 4:** Adept Warriors / Adept Mystics (38/39) → Completable (?-)37-45(-?) / Not Completable 1-29(-?)  
- **Group 5:** Soldiers / Elders (48/49) → Completable (?-)45-60 / Not Completable 1-39(-?)  
- **Group 6:** Adept Soldiers / Adept Elders (58/59) → Completable (?-)45-60 / Not Completable 1-39(-?)
Pickclaw Key:
## Pickclaw Key Quest

**Level:** ALL  
**Class:** ALL  
**Quest NPC:** Yalie Keylotte / Gilly Locketoe  
**Location:** Highpass / Rivervale

> "Shoddy Pickclaw Keys" drop off goblins in Highpass and Rivervale. All levels of goblins drop them.

Loot a key, then talk to **Yalie Keylotta** (Highpass) or **Gilly Locketoe** (Rivervale) to log the pet quest.

### Directions
- Head out to **Runneyeye**  
- At first wall, before main encampment, take small valley down to your right, then first right  
- Kill light blue guards until **Superior Jailor** spawns  
- First person hit by Jailor is ported to the 'jail'; invisible walls enclose them  
- Remaining group kills higher-level guards until **Head Pickclaw Jailor** spawns

### Head Pickclaw Jailor
- Tough caster  
- Drops **four keys**  
- Loot one key and head to the 'jail' where your groupmate is banished  
- Invisible walls disappear on approach, talk to prisoner  
- Choose one reward: pickclaw pet, pickclaw sash, or pickclaw form

### Rewards
- **Sturdy Pickclaw Pet**: Buffs 400 AC, STR, AGI, INT; 10 charges; lasts until dismissed  
- **Convincing Pickclaw Illusion**: Stackable stats; gives DEX, WIS, CHA  
- **Sash**: Belt; stats vary by level
Siloth Ring:
## Siloth Ring Hunt & Gather Quest

The **Siloth Ring** Hunt and Gather (HnG) quest is popular for leveling toons **level 30-45**. Speak to **Sergeant Sturgol**, located in the tower directly above the entrance to FW. If you are evil and the FW NPCs are red-faced to you, turn into your first were-form, then recon—NPCs should be white-faced and you can log the quest.

You are rewarded for every **four Siloth Insignia Rings** turned in to Sergeant Sturgol. Using **luck or XP pots** will make this more profitable.

Once you reach **level 46**, speak to **Captain Riloh** in the same tower, on the opposite side, to log a new Siloth quest. The required rings for this quest are harder to get and drop less often, but still provide good XP when turned in.
Weak Herbs & Roots:
## Weak Herbs/Roots Hunt & Gather Quest

**Quest Name:** Weak Herbs/Roots  
**Level:** 25-?  
**Class:** All  
**NPC:** Agent of Growth  
**Location:** Lake Rathe

This is a **Hunt and Gather (HnG)** quest for all levels of toons, though it's most effective XP-wise on lower level toons.

Kill the orcs outside Freeport and collect **Weak Roots** and **Weak Herbs** (suggest using a higher-level toon to collect for your lower-level toon). Items can stack to 99.

Head to **Lake Rathe (c)**, on top of an island in the lake. Speak to the **Agent of Growth**, who will send you to chat briefly with her **gnomish intern**. Return to Agent of Growth, who will direct you to speak with her **Assistant**.

The **Assistant** gives a quest to bring back **3 Bitter Herbs/Roots** (weak ones count!). Once obtained, speak again with the Assistant who gives you a **Rallosian Healing Device** to use on the portal. Con the portal and press square; the device heals the portal and you receive an **Empty Rallosian Healing Device** back.

Speak again with the **Assistant** to be rewarded with **1,000,000 XP** and **1,500 Tunar** for every 3 items you turn in. This involves a lot of talking and clicking per turn-in, but starting as low as level 20 can gain multiple levels quickly.

Like **Siloth Rings**, these items can also be farmed and sold at auction (~10k each).
